diagnostics.message: CONSTRAINT_POLARITY_NAME_HEURISTIC: Constraint 'severityWarnOverdue' uses the legacy name-prefix heuristic for negative polarity. Declare 'failWhen: true' explicitly and rename the constraint to suppress this warning.

CONSTRAINT_POLARITY_NAME_HEURISTIC: Constraint 'severityBlockCancelled' uses the legacy name-prefix heuristic for negative polarity. Declare 'failWhen: true' explicitly and rename the constraint to suppress this warning.
Entity 'Task' is persisted (has store) but has no commands and is not referenced by any relationship — it is unreachable in the product. Add commands or relationships, or remove the entity.
